properties.name: Solar Array
properties.description: 12 x 580W panels powering a DIFFUL solar submersible pump at the borehole.

properties.name: Solar Fence
properties.description: Chain link fence enclosing the solar array and pump controller.

properties.name: Pump controller
properties.description: Pump controller, located inside the solar fence.

properties.name: School Garden Tank
properties.description: 8,000 liters, 2 m wide x 2.5 m tall, on a 3 m stand (0.3-0.55 bar depending on fill level).

properties.description: 8,000 liters, 2 m wide x 2.5 m tall, on a 3 m stand (0.3-0.55 bar depending on fill level).
